title: taraxacum subericinum
intro: Taraxacum subericinum, also known as the Sichuan dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the mountainous regions of Sichuan, China. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat digestive issues, fever, and inflammation. The health benefits of Taraxacum subericinum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum subericinum are often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
